body:
## Summary
Two rebase-related fixes:

1. **LobbyPage.jsx** — `git checkout --theirs` during rebase selected PR #128's old layout instead of PR #127's new 3-card design. Restored correct version from `feat/lobby-leaderboard-navbar-pr` and re-applied the profile card removal from commit 497d4b5.

2. **docker-compose.yml** — `VITE_API_URL` → `VITE_API_BASE_URL=http://backend:3000`. The wrong env var name caused Vite proxy to target `localhost:3000` (container itself) instead of `backend:3000` (Docker service), returning 500 for all API calls.
title: fix: restore LobbyPage layout lost in rebase, fix Docker proxy env
